entries.title: MEMORY.md Updated with Norse Architecture
entries.content:
Updated MEMORY.md long-term memory with:

- Norse pantheon agent architecture (7 agents, roles, communication walls)
- Risk management parameters (circuit breakers, stop-loss, take-profit)
- Tracking systems (Calendar, Journal, Notes, QMD)
- Updated target from $50/day to $200/day
- Added timezone and contact info

This ensures session continuity for the trading operation.

entries.title: Timezone Correction for HEARTBEAT
entries.content:
Fixed HEARTBEAT.md to use America/Chicago (CDT/UTC-5) timezone explicitly.

Changed:
- Schedule table now shows both CDT and UTC times
- 8:00 AM CDT = 13:00 UTC
- 9:00 PM CDT = 02:00 UTC
- 11:00 PM CDT = 04:00 UTC

This ensures heartbeat checks fire at the correct local time for Alexandria, MN.

entries.title: Calendar & Journal Systems Added
entries.content:
Added two new tracking systems to The Hub:

**Calendar (/calendar):**
- Goals with deadlines and priorities
- Project milestones
- Visual calendar view
- Auto-overdue detection
- Categories: trading, strategy, agent, infrastructure, research

**Journal (/journal):**
- Date-based entries for changes, decisions, learnings
- Categories: trading, strategy, agent, infrastructure, research, general
- Tags for searchability
- References to bots, strategies, files

**API Endpoints:**
- GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/calendar
- GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/journal

**Integration:**
- Added to The Hub sidebar
- Quick-add from chat: "goal:" and "journal:" prefixes

entries.title: Norse Pantheon Agent Architecture Deployed
entries.content:
Created 7-agent Norse-themed architecture for trading operations:

**Agents:**
- 📯 Heimdall: Coordinator, spawns subagents, monitors all
- 🦅 Huginn: Scout, market research, opportunity discovery
- ⚔️ Tyr: Strategist, strategy development, backtesting
- 🔨 Sindri: Smith, bot implementation from specs
- 🌊 Njord: Treasurer, read-only fund tracking
- ⚡ Thor: Executor, live trading within circuit breakers
- 🌳 Mimir: Operator, infrastructure and The Hub

**Communication Walls:**
- Treasury (Njord) isolated from code agents
- Execution (Thor) cannot change strategy
- Each agent has specific allowed communication partners

**Files Created:**
- /storage/workspace/agents/{heimdall,huginn,tyr,sindri,njord,thor,mimir}/SKILL.md
- /storage/workspace/yggdrasil/INDEX.md
- /storage/workspace/treasury/{allocations,balances,circuit_breakers,daily_pnl}.json

**The Hub Updated:**
- Agent Activity panel shows real-time status
- Norse naming throughout

entries.title: XRP Bot v2.1 — Stop-Loss & Take-Profit
entries.content:
Upgraded bot_mc.py to bot_mc_v2_1.py with comprehensive risk management:

**New Features:**
- Stop-loss: 2% default (configurable via --stop-loss)
- Take-profit: 4% default (2:1 R:R)
- Trailing stop: 1.5% after 2% profit activation
- Daily loss limit: 5% pause
- Consecutive loss limit: 5 trades pause

**Implementation:**
- RiskConfig class for all risk parameters
- check_stop_loss(), check_take_profit(), check_trailing_stop() methods
- Position state tracking (highest_price_since_entry for trailing)
- Auto-status updates between not-started → in-progress → completed → overdue

**Files Changed:**
- /storage/workspace/projects/trading/pionex/xrp/bot_mc_v2_1.py (new)
- /storage/workspace/projects/trading/strategies/xrp-market-cipher-v2.md (updated)

**Testing:**
- Stop-loss triggers at 2% loss: ✓
- Take-profit triggers at 4% gain: ✓
- Trailing stop activates after 2% profit and trails at 1.5%: ✓
